name: veritio-monorepo
description: Protocol-first OSS evidence layer for application audit trails, consent history, data subject workflows, retention, and compliance exports.

scripts.build: bun run --cwd sdks/typescript build && bun run --cwd storage build && bun run --cwd adapters/better-auth build && bun run --cwd adapters/next build && bun run --cwd adapters/tanstack-start build && bun run --cwd adapters/sveltekit build && bun run --cwd adapters/react build && bun run --cwd adapters/vue build && bun run --cwd adapters/svelte build
scripts.test: bun run --cwd sdks/typescript build && bun test sdks/typescript/src && bun test storage/src && bun test adapters/better-auth/src && bun test adapters/next/src && bun test adapters/tanstack-start/src && bun test adapters/sveltekit/src && bun test adapters/react/src && bun test adapters/vue/src && bun test adapters/svelte/src && PYTHONPATH=sdks/python/src python3 -m unittest discover -s sdks/python/tests && cd sdks/go && go test ./...
scripts.test:better-auth: bun run --cwd sdks/typescript build && bun test adapters/better-auth/src
scripts.test:adapters: bun run --cwd sdks/typescript build && bun test adapters/better-auth/src adapters/next/src adapters/tanstack-start/src adapters/sveltekit/src adapters/react/src adapters/vue/src adapters/svelte/src
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd sdks/typescript typecheck && bun run --cwd sdks/typescript build && bun run --cwd storage typecheck && bun run --cwd adapters/better-auth typecheck && bun run --cwd adapters/next typecheck && bun run --cwd adapters/tanstack-start typecheck && bun run --cwd adapters/sveltekit typecheck && bun run --cwd adapters/react typecheck && bun run --cwd adapters/vue typecheck && bun run --cwd adapters/svelte typecheck
scripts.verify: bun run test && bun run typecheck && bun run build
